title: Product Sales Analysis I
output_format: product_name, year, and price for each sale_id.
example_input: Sales entries for Nokia and Apple products.
example_output: Rows showing the product_name, year, and price.
constraints: Each sale has a valid product_id.
function_signature: SELECT p.product_name, s.year, s.price FROM Sales s JOIN Product p ON s.product_id = p.product_id;
